chat_history.content:
ARES Orchestrator is a powerful security assessment platform designed to provide comprehensive vulnerability analysis across various domains. It delegates specialized tasks to a suite of sub-agents, including those for Solana vulnerability analysis, DeFi security auditing, rug pull detection, secret hygiene scanning, and supply chain analysis. ARES Orchestrator then synthesizes the findings from these specialized agents into professional, executive-quality security assessment reports, offering a holistic view of the security posture.

A PDF report introducing these capabilities has been successfully generated: `asst-cli_security_report.pdf` in `C:\Users\LENOVO\Documents\ASST\apps\asst-cli\.asst\reports`.
